issues.description: deliverable_b_competitors has no DSN/live command path. datalake_helper.top_competitors exists elsewhere but is not consumed here. Cannot produce real market competitor list from PostgreSQL until wired + data present.
issues.recommendation: Follow-up: add live/from-dsn command that maps DatalakeClient.top_competitors (or supplier_contracts aggregation) into select_competitors candidates; keep fail-closed when empty (INSUFFICIENT, no pad).

issues.description: SelectionRule.uf_filter defaults to 'SC' and appears in selection_rule JSON, but select_competitors never filters by UF.
issues.recommendation: Either apply uf_filter on candidate UFs/geo, or remove/null the field until implemented to avoid rubber-stamp configurability claim.

residual_risks: Live path not wired to DSN — mechanism proven on fixture only; real SC market list requires datalake wiring + contracts data
uf_filter declared but not applied in selection
Fixture CNPJs are synthetic (schema proof), not real market winners

may_flip_dod_conditions: PO accepts residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED (mechanism claim, not live market population claim)
Flip narrative must state fixture/schema proof + fail-closed rules; must NOT claim 15 real SC competitors from live PG
Optional: keep L206 open until live path if PO wants operational market evidence before [x]
